DescribePlannedEvents.action: Action performed on the instance; this parameter value: DescribePlannedEvents
DescribePlannedEvents.serverEventStatus: Event status; supported values: Inquiring, Processing, Executing, Executed, Abnormal, DisConfirm
DescribePlannedEvents.productCategory: Product category of the affected instance (BBC / BCC / HPAS)
DescribePlannedEvents.serverEventLogTimeFilter: Query events within the periodStartTime and periodEndTime range by event operation log type; supported values: EventCreate, EventAuthorize, EventExecuting, RejectCheckResult
DescribePlannedEvents.periodStartTime: Start time for timeFilter; if empty, only periodEndTime is used as constraint; BCE-compliant date format
DescribePlannedEvents.periodEndTime: End time for timeFilter; if empty, only periodStartTime is used as constraint; BCE-compliant date format
DescribePlannedEvents.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page; typically no more than 100; default is 10
DescribePlannedEvents.marker: Starting event ID for paginated list queries
